data.name: Catch2
data.description: A modern, C++-native, test framework for unit-tests, TDD and BDD - using C++14, C++17 and later (C++11 support is in v2.x branch, and C++03 on the Catch1.x branch)

data.name: claude-code-templates
data.description: CLI tool for configuring and monitoring Claude Code

data.name: stitch-skills
data.description: A library of Agent Skills designed to work with the Stitch MCP server. Each skill follows the Agent Skills open standard, for compatibility with coding agents such as Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Cursor.

data.name: terraform
data.description: Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.

data.name: meshoptimizer
data.description: Mesh optimization library that makes meshes smaller and faster to render

data.name: DesktopCommanderMCP
data.description: This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities

data.name: bun
data.description: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one
